# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension · Site Experience Atlas v37 Report

## Summary

v37 turns the accumulated demos and public pages into a complete website experience. The release keeps every existing page, adds a clean global navigation layer, replaces the overcrowded home page with an intent-first front door, and adds a complete Experience Atlas.

## Improvements

- New homepage focused on next-step clarity.
- New `experience-atlas.html` with search, filters, guided paths, and full page library.
- Global navigation injected across root pages and the Evidence Docket.
- Duplicate/overcrowded top navigation is hidden by the new global nav.
- Public boundaries stay visible: no wallet on public pages, no user data wanted, no AGIALPHA availability from the site, expert operations separated.
- Build metadata now reports `siteExperienceAtlas: PASS`.

## Operational posture

The publisher remains dependency-zero, registry-independent, pathspec-proof, and GitHub Pages-ready.
